LanguageData.MechCarrierDesc_Free: Command this unit to spawn {0} {1}. This action consumes no resources.
LanguageData.WULA_AutoSpawn_Desc: Toggles automatic unit production. When enabled, units will be automatically produced when resources and cooldown allow, maintaining the queue limit.
LanguageData.WULA_AutoSpawn_On_Reason: Auto production enabled. Click again to disable.
LanguageData.WULA_WorkMode_Work_Desc: Work Mode - Performs work according to unit settings
LanguageData.WULA_WorkMode_Recharge_Desc: Recharge Mode - Recharges then enters hibernation
LanguageData.WULA_WorkMode_Shutdown_Desc: Shutdown Mode - Immediately shuts down, charges at a very slow rate in this state
LanguageData.WULA_LowEnergySwitchToRecharge: {0} energy low, switching to recharge mode
LanguageData.WULA_FullyChargedSwitchToWork: {0} fully charged, returning to work mode
LanguageData.WULA_Autonomous_Mode_Desc: Command autonomous mechs into drafted state
LanguageData.WULA_NanoRepair_DisableDesc: Turn off nano repair system to save energy
LanguageData.WULA_NanoRepair_EnableDesc: Turn on nano repair system to automatically repair damage
LanguageData.WULA_NoRequiredFlyOver: Requires {0} over colony to air-drop buildings
LanguageData.WULA_RequiresFlyOver: Requires {0} over colony to air-drop buildings
LanguageData.WULA_MissingFlyOver: Requires {0} over colony to air-drop buildings
LanguageData.WULA_ThickRoofBlockingDesc: Thick rock roof at drop location prevents air-drop
LanguageData.WULA_RoofBlockingDesc: Roof at drop location prevents air-drop
LanguageData.WULA_NoBuildingDropperFlyOver: Requires warship with building drop facilities deployed in colony orbit for air-drop
LanguageData.WULA_RequiresBuildingDropperFlyOver: Requires warship with building drop facilities deployed in colony orbit for air-drop
LanguageData.WULA_MissingBuildingDropperFlyOver: No warship with building drop facilities deployed in colony orbit
LanguageData.WULA_BuildingIncomingFromGlobal: Building called from global storage will arrive in {0}
LanguageData.WULA_NoBuildingDropperFlyOver: Requires building drop aircraft in area
LanguageData.WULA_TeleportBuildingDesc: Use Wula Empire's teleportation network to teleport {0} to designated location—alternative to air-drop buildings, can complete construction under thick rock roofs with faster response.
LanguageData.WULA_NonPlayerCannotCall: Non-player factions cannot manually call buildings
LanguageData.WULA_BuildingArrivingInFromGlobal: Building called from global storage will arrive in {0}
LanguageData.WULA_CallSkyfallerDesc: Call corresponding building air-drop from Wula Empire fleet to this location. Air-drop buildings consume resources equal to their construction cost.
LanguageData.WULA_SkyfallerIncomingFromGlobal: Air-drop building in transit, arriving in {0}. Due to insufficient local resources, this air-drop consumed stored resources from Wula Empire fleet.
LanguageData.WULA_SkyfallerIncoming: Air-drop building in transit, arriving in {0}.
LanguageData.WULA_SkyfallerArrivingInFromGlobal: Air-drop building will arrive in {0}, due to insufficient local resources, consumed stored resources from Wula Empire fleet.
LanguageData.WULA_ResourcePriorityInfo: Prioritized from within range of Wula Orbital Delivery Beacon. If insufficient resources, consume stored resources from Wula Empire fleet.
LanguageData.WULA_InsufficientMaterials: Insufficient materials within range of Wula Orbital Delivery Beacon. You need to build Wula Orbital Delivery Beacon and place enough materials within its signal range; these materials will be automatically submitted to Empire fleet during construction.\n\nAdditionally, resources stored on Wula Empire fleet will also be considered.
LanguageData.WULA_MinorBreakdownDesc: Synth has minor malfunctions, reduced work efficiency
LanguageData.WULA_MajorBreakdownDesc: Synth has major malfunctions, requires immediate maintenance
LanguageData.WULA_CannotChangeStuffAfterStart: Cannot change material after production starts
LanguageData.WULA_RecipeDoesNotSupportStuff: This weapon doesn't support material selection
LanguageData.WULA_NanoRepairCostPerHP: Nano Repair Energy Cost per HP
LanguageData.WULA_NanoRepairCostPerHP_Desc: Energy consumed by nano repair system per hit point repaired. Lower values mean lower repair cost.
LanguageData.WULA_NanoRepairCooldownAfterDamage_Desc: Cooldown time for nano repair system after taking damage. Lower values mean faster system response.
LanguageData.WULA_Maintenance_DegradationFactor_Expla:
• Pre-threshold degradation rate: {0}/day
• Post-threshold degradation rate: {1}/day
• Threshold days: {2} days
LanguageData.WULA_Energy_MaxLevelOffset_PawnExplanati: Wula Energy Max Level Offset: Affects this individual's maximum energy storage.
LanguageData.WULA_Energy_FallRateFactor_PawnExplanati: Wula Energy Consumption Rate: Affects this individual's energy consumption rate.
LanguageData.WULA_Energy_MaxLevelOffset_RaceExplanati: Wula Energy Max Level Offset: Affects this race's maximum energy storage.
LanguageData.WULA_Energy_FallRateFactor_RaceExplanati: Wula Energy Consumption Rate: Affects this race's energy consumption rate.
LanguageData.WULA_SwitchableHediff_SwitchDesc: Click to open menu and select different effect modes
LanguageData.WULA_SwitchableHediff_StatusDesc: Click to view current effect details
LanguageData.WULA_CurrentExperienceDesc: Total experience accumulated by this weapon
LanguageData.WULA_CurrentQualityDesc: Current quality level of this weapon
LanguageData.WULA_TrackedSkill: Skill tracked for autonomous core experience: {0}
LanguageData.WULA_WeaponEvolving: {0}'s autonomous core is evolving with its user's gained experience, improving weapon quality
LanguageData.WULA_WeaponMastering: {0}'s autonomous core experience has reached maximum level!
LanguageData.WULA_EjectDataPackDesc: Extract data contained in autonomous core as data pack absorbable by other weapons' autonomous cores. Weapon resets to initial state.
LanguageData.WULA_AbsorbDataPackDesc: Autonomous core will absorb experience from nearby data packs to improve this weapon's quality.
LanguageData.WULA_NoDataPackNearby: No compatible data packs found nearby
LanguageData.WULA_OverflowExperienceDesc: Stored experience exceeding maximum quality threshold
LanguageData.WULA_DataPackPartiallyAbsorbed: Absorbed {0} experience, {1} converted to overflow data pack
LanguageData.WULA_DataPackOverflowOnly: All {0} experience converted to overflow data pack (max quality reached)
LanguageData.WULA_ResearchRequired: Using this ability requires research tech {0}
LanguageData.WULA_GlobalFlyOverCooldown.NoAvailableFa: No available weapon arrays on orbiting warships (total {0}, all on cooldown)
LanguageData.WULA_GlobalFlyOverCooldown.CooldownTime: Cooldown time for weapon arrays after using this support: {0}
LanguageData.WULA_TaxCollection.Status: Resources required for submission to Wula Empire Fleet: {0} {1} {2}
LanguageData.ToggleAreaDamageDesc: Enable or disable area damage effect
LanguageData.WULA_SwitchWeapon_Desc: Drop current weapon and equip this unit's initial weapon
LanguageData.WULA_HideAreaShieldDesc: Hide this unit's area reflector shield. This doesn't affect actual functionality, only visual effect.
LanguageData.WULA_ShowAreaShieldDesc: Show this unit's area reflector shield. This doesn't affect actual functionality, only visual effect.
LanguageData.WULA_ConvertingMechs: Converting {0} Wula cats in bunker to {1}.
LanguageData.WULA_RecycleNearbyMechsDesc: Call Wula cats within {0} tiles to report, for conversion to other cat types or to use bunker weapons against enemies.
LanguageData.WULA_ConvertMechsDesc: Release Wula cats from bunker. They can choose equipment before leaving to change type.\nCapacity: {0}/{1}
LanguageData.WULA_NoAvailableMechs: No Wula cats on standby in bunker.
LanguageData.WULA_MechsOrderedToRecycle: {0} Wula cats called back to bunker.
LanguageData.WULA_BuildingCooldown: Building just deployed, need to wait {0} hours before transformation
LanguageData.WULA_NeedMoreMechs: Requires {0} Wula cats to report, current: {1}/{2}
LanguageData.WULA_NoSuitablePositionFound: No suitable placement positions found nearby
LanguageData.WULA_DeployingAtNearbyPosition: Will deploy building at nearby position {0}
LanguageData.WULA_TeleportFailedNoValidLocation: No valid landing location after teleport, teleport cancelled.
LanguageData.WULA_PullFailedNoValidLocation: Pull failed: No suitable landing position found
LanguageData.WULA_MustTargetPawn: Must select a creature as target
LanguageData.WULA_NoLineOfSight: No line of sight to target
LanguageData.WULA_TeleporterEnableDesc: Enable area teleportation, allowing Wula mechs to teleport instead of normal movement within its coverage.
LanguageData.WULA_TeleporterDisableDesc: Disable area teleportation. Wula mechs nearby will use normal movement instead of teleportation.
LanguageData.WULA_ConvertToSilverDesc: Launch drop pod to Wula Empire Fleet. All item values converted to silver at {0} ratio, stored in fleet resources
LanguageData.WULA_CannotConvert: Cannot sell: Contains forbidden items or container empty
LanguageData.WULA_ValueConverted: Successfully converted items worth {0} to {1} silver
LanguageData.WULA_ValueConvertedWithLoss: Successfully converted items worth {0} to {1} silver (conversion rate: {2})
LanguageData.WULA_ValueConvertedWithBonus: Successfully converted items worth {0} to {1} silver (bonus rate: {2})
LanguageData.WULA_ConvertToCurrencyDesc: Launch drop pod to Wula Empire Fleet. All item values converted to {0} at {1}% ratio, stored in fleet resources.
LanguageData.WULA_ConverterNotSpawned: Converter must be placed on map to use.
LanguageData.WULA_ConvertedValueTooLow: Value after sale too low to generate any currency.
LanguageData.WULA_LaunchCancelledDueToForbiddenItems: Launch cancelled due to forbidden items: {0}
LanguageData.WULA_TransferSilverDesc: Retrieve {0} silver stored on Wula Empire Fleet. They will be air-dropped with the next product drop.
LanguageData.WULA_ConfirmTransferSilver: Are you sure you want to withdraw {0} silver stored on Wula Empire Fleet?
LanguageData.WULA_NoSilverToTransfer: No silver stored on Wula Empire Fleet
LanguageData.WULA_SilverTransferred: Withdrew {0} silver, will be air-dropped with the next product drop.
LanguageData.WULA_Designator_CallSkyfallerInAreaDesc: Mark an area to activate all Wula Empire buildings and war mechs needing air-drop within it.\n\nArea air-drop still calculates material consumption. If insufficient materials, no air-drop will occur.
LanguageData.WULA_NoCallableBuildingsInArea: No Wula Empire air-drop zones in area accepting air-drop commands
LanguageData.WULA_AbilityRequiresNonHostility: Cannot use this ability while hostile with {0}
